kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/auth path_url=/auth headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '48', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"username": "admin", "password": "password123"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: POST
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking path_url=/booking headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-type': 'application/json', 'Content-Length': '184'} body=b'{"firstname": "Susu", "lastname": "Makan", "totalprice": 120, "depositpaid": false, "bookingdates": {"checkin": "2026-06-20", "checkout": "2026-06-20"}, "additionalneeds": "Breakfast"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: GET
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking?firstname=Susu&lastname=Makan path_url=/booking?firstname=Susu&lastname=Makan headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None

GET Response : url=https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking?firstname=Susu&lastname=Makan status=200, reason=OK headers={'Content-Length': '20', 'Content-Type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8', 'Date': 'Mon, 22 Jun 2026 17:46:33 GMT', 'Etag': 'W/"14-5Jat7/inaj+NgZRgDokCYC2ROu8"', 'Nel': '{"report_to":"heroku-nel","response_headers":["Via"],"max_age":3600,"success_fraction":0.01,"failure_fraction":0.1}', 'Report-To': '{"group":"heroku-nel","endpoints":[{"url":"https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=%2B9hDTLrJAxlbP%2FK%2FTfivI%2BQgcKbwKdUOQ6rUEmLuwLo%3D\\u0026sid=c46efe9b-d3d2-4a0c-8c76-bfafa16c5add\\u0026ts=1782150393"}],"max_age":3600}', 'Reporting-Endpoints': 'heroku-nel="https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=%2B9hDTLrJAxlbP%2FK%2FTfivI%2BQgcKbwKdUOQ6rUEmLuwLo%3D&sid=c46efe9b-d3d2-4a0c-8c76-bfafa16c5add&ts=1782150393"', 'Server': 'Heroku', 'Via': '1.1 heroku-router', 'X-Powered-By': 'Express'} body=[{"bookingid":3006}]
kw.doc: Sends a GET request.
